opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My knees feel like they are grinding bone on bone and will collapse under me, and I can't catch my breath even just walking across the room.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Today I can't stand or walk without agony in both knees and getting so breathless I have to sit straight back down — I can't even get to the bathroom on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: the knees have been getting worse over the past month; today it suddenly got much worse
symptom_narrative.duration: about a month, with a sharp worsening today
symptom_narrative.character: a grinding, bone-on-bone pain in both knees, with a feeling they will give way; the breathlessness comes on the moment I try to move
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the knee pain is excruciating and I can't put weight on them at all today
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both knees and hips, the weight-bearing joints
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse with any movement or standing, eases when I sit down and rest
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting; staying off my feet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing, walking, or putting any weight through the knees
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very breathless whenever I move, then it settles when I stop; exhausted and worn out all the time; bad burning heartburn when I lie flat; my partner says I snore loudly and I'm sleepy in the daytime
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the knee pain has been building for a long time and getting steadily worse, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck in the chair today, can't get to the bathroom without help, frightened of falling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've been very overweight for a long time
wear-and-tear arthritis in both knees for years
my partner says I snore badly and I'm very sleepy during the day

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: very limited movement because of the knees; largely housebound
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: partner is here helping; the hallways at home are narrow and the chairs are low and hard to get out of

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-stated weight, not measured this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: a dark, velvety-looking patch of skin on the back of my neck
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/carer description over video, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: a red, raw, moist rash in the deep skin folds of my tummy
breathing looks fast and heavy after moving from the chair, then eases when resting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: partner's observation, not a measured respiratory rate
